case_title: EGGELING KURT R VS LITTLETON JAKE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY EGGELING KURT R AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLETON JAKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
